title: Semantic color palette
definition_of_done: 7 lipgloss.Style vars (Critical, Warning, Advisory, OK, Info, Muted, ActionRequired) defined; TestSemanticPalette passes
outcome: Created internal/tui/colors.go with 7 lipgloss.Style vars (Critical=#FF0000, Warning=#FFCC00, Advisory=#FF8C00, OK=#00CC44, Info=#00CCFF, Muted=#808080, ActionRequired=#CC44FF); TestSemanticPalette passes

notes.msg: Created internal/tui/colors.go with 7 semantic lipgloss.Style vars (Critical=#FF0000 red, Warning=#FFCC00 yellow, Advisory=#FF8C00 orange, OK=#00CC44 green, Info=#00CCFF cyan, Muted=#808080 grey, ActionRequired=#CC44FF magenta). TestSemanticPalette passes; go build ./... clean.
